Architectural + Interior Design Services in the leafy north-east suburbs of Naarm/Melbourne.
We pay respect to the Wurundjeri Woi-Wurrung of the Kulin Nation as the Custodians of the Country on which we live and work. We recognise the continued connection which Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Peoples have to the land, waters and skies of this continent.

Approach

  • We value relationships with people, the community and nature.
  • We work with you to understand how you live, how we can enhance that spatially.
  • We develop a design brief with you, and work with your budget.
  • We believe in not taking more than you need from the natural environment to building what you need.
  • We listen to what your needs and aspirations are for your project and translate this into the built outcome.
  • We work within the framework of the traditional Architectural design phases. These phases are Pre-Design, Concept Design, Design Development (Town Planning, if required), Contract Documentation and Contract Administration (Construction).
  • We advise on which consultants are required for your project, and work with Town Planning consultants and Building Surveyors to obtain Planning and Building Permits, respectively.
  • We seek to create projects that balance function and aesthetics. Our aesthetic is unfussy and classic. We employ a low-tech approach to sustainable design that prioritises natural light and ventilation, thermal insulation and optimal site orientation. We prioritise building material choices and processes that are socially and environmentally conscious (we believe both are linked). Yes, we’re Architects who do Interiors as well. We love a neutral palette, but we’re not afraid to use colour where warranted.
  • We are a people-oriented practice and strive to enhance individual and collective health and well-being through our work. If you would like to discuss your project please get in touch.

About

New kitchen in Naarm CBD apartment

We provide Architectural and Interior Design Services to enhance your living, specialising in (but not limited to) residential projects.

Principal Architect, Meena Gill, brings 20+ years of Architectural experience from the public, commercial and residential design and construction sectors.

Livity Architecture & Interiors is based in the leafy North-East of Naarm on Wurundjeri willam Country. We design and build on unceded Aboriginal Country. We recognise the continued connection which Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Peoples have to the land, waters and skies of this continent. We pay the rent via First Nations mutual-aid.

Services

Architectural and Interior Design services for home renovations, new homes and interior fitouts.

Architectural and Interior Design Services for small community and civic projects.
